prompt: Build a website with a 3D asset generator on the left. I want to be able to generate different geometric shapes like cubes, spheres, and toruses, and have controls on the right to change the color and size.

assertions.description: HTML file includes Three.js CDN script tag
Page has a two-panel layout with 3D canvas on the left
Right panel has controls to select shape type (cube/sphere/torus)
Right panel has a color control (input or picker)
Right panel has a size/scale control
Output HTML file is saved inside the assets/ directory
